DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN, Esq. (tel: 415-851-5297) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors LLC's unopposed demurrer to complaint is sustained with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN, Esq. (tel: 415-851-5297) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors LLC's unopposed motion to strike complaint is granted with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
